user_feedback: level 1 isn't playable, now there are so many walls all over the place, I believe the level system is broken perhaps, maybe its all the levels are spawning all at once, make sure the 9 levels are spearated in the rendering system, right now level one as a bunch of walls in the middle that block off the goal, change eveyrthing in the levels
analysis:
- Issue identified: All 9 levels' obstacles (walls, water hazards, ramps) are being created at initialization and stored in global arrays. When rendering and collision detection occurs, ALL obstacles from ALL levels are being processed at once, making level 1 (and all levels) completely blocked with obstacles from other levels.

- Files affected: 
  - course.js (hole creation and rendering logic)
  - entities.js (Wall, WaterHazard, Ramp, Hole classes to store obstacles per-hole)
  - physics.js (collision detection to only check current hole's obstacles)

- Changes needed:
  1. Modify Hole class to store its own arrays of walls, waterHazards, and ramps
  2. Change Wall/WaterHazard/Ramp constructors to accept and register with a specific hole
  3. Update hole creation functions to pass the hole object to obstacle constructors
  4. Update renderCourse() to only render obstacles from the current hole
  5. Update physics collision detection to only check obstacles from the current hole
